mdSummary:
# Sparkles

Decorative sparkle particle animation.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/sparkles

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Sparkles | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Sparkles | Count | `int` | `5` |  |
| Sparkles | MinSize | `int` | `6` |  |
| Sparkles | MaxSize | `int` | `14` |  |
| Sparkles | Color | `string` | `"var(--color-primary)"` | CSS color of the sparkles — defaults to var(--color-primary). |
| Sparkles | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Sparkles | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
